A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying "Coffee House Too Cafe" as the top business, the agent parsed the business description and, in execute_python, deliberately returned only the first category ("Restaurants") by taking cats[0] instead of all categories listed, leading to an incomplete category answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying Coffee House Too Cafe, the agent fetched its description listing multiple categories but then, in execute_python, deliberately selected only the first category (category = cats[0]), returning “Restaurants” instead of all categories (“Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes”).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying Coffee House Too Cafe via the SQL query and fetching its description from the business collection, the agent’s execute_python step extracted categories but kept only the first one (“Restaurants”) instead of all listed categories (“Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes”), leading to an incomplete final answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing SQL (call_kUpbfBZb0ENWPno8ZSCTfV6I), the agent applied HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 after filtering by the date range—thus requiring at least 5 reviews within the period—an added constraint not requested, which led it to select businessref_37 instead of the ground-truth Coffee House Too Cafe.
